zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Alfreton於1170年出生在英國德比夏爾阿爾福雷頓時，她的父親William de Alfreton22歲，母親Idonea Blackwell19歲。她和William Chaworth至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1225年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾波奧福享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Alfreton was born in 1170, in Alfreton, Derbyshire, England, her father, William de Alfreton, was 22 and her mother, Idonea Blackwell, was 19. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with William Chaworth. She died in 1225, in Beauchief, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Alfreton est née en 1170, à Alfreton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Alfreton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Idonea Blackwell, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec William Chaworth. Elle est décédée en 1225, à Beauchief, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Alfreton 1170 in Alfreton, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Alfreton 22 und ihre Mutter Idonea Blackwell 19. Sie hatte mit William Chaworth mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1225 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Beauchief, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Alfreton è nata il nel 1170 nel Alfreton, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, William de Alfreton, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Idonea Blackwell, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con William Chaworth. Morì nel 1225, nel Beauchief, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Alfretonが1170年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアルフレトンで生まれた時，父William de Alfretonは22歳，母Idonea Blackwellは19歳であった。彼女はWilliam Chaworthとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1225年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアビーウチエフで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Alfreton(이)가 1170년 영국 더비실르 알프레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Alfreton(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idonea Blackwell(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 William Chaworth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 보치프에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Alfreton nasceu em 1170, em Alfreton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Alfreton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Idonea Blackwell, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com William Chaworth. Ela faleceu em 1225, em Beauchief, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Alfreton родилась в 1170 г. в местности алфретон, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Alfreton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Idonea Blackwell, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от William Chaworth. Она умерла в 1225 г. в местности бочиеф, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Alfreton nació en 1170, en Alfreton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Alfreton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Idonea Blackwell, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con William Chaworth. Murió en 1225, en Beauchief, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
